notes: Bu dosya ai.acik.com tek-domain Cloudflare yayini icin GitHub environment seviyesinde tutulacak degisken ve secret sozlesmesini tanimlar.
CLOUDFLARE_BACKEND_ORIGIN Cloudflare edge tarafindan erisilebilir bir origin olmalidir; private 10.x adresi dogrudan kullanilamaz.
Route/zone degerleri Cloudflare delegation modeli netlestiginde kesinlestirilir.

required_vars.name: WEB_DEPLOY_PROVIDER
required_vars.purpose: deploy-web workflow'unun Cloudflare yolunu secmesini saglar

required_vars.name: CLOUDFLARE_PUBLIC_ORIGIN
required_vars.purpose: shell ve remote build pathlerinin canonical public origin'i

required_vars.name: CLOUDFLARE_BACKEND_ORIGIN
constraints: publicly reachable or Cloudflare tunnel reachable
must not be a private 10.x-only address unless tunneled

required_secrets.name: WEB_SMOKE_URL
required_secrets.purpose: Deploy sonrasi ayni workflow icinde web smoke kontrolu
